name: Strawberry Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a salad dressing by combining the raspberry vinegar, vegetable oil, and water in a bowl.
2. Add the chopped shallots and freshly ground black pepper to the dressing. Mix well.
3. Tear the spinach into bite-sized pieces and arrange it on a serving platter or individual plates.
4. Place the sliced strawberries in a spiral formation over the spinach leaves.
5. Drizzle the salad with the prepared dressing, ensuring an even distribution.
6. Serve immediately and enjoy your colorful salad paired with a semi-soft cheese like St. Nectaire for a delightful combination of flavors.
SERVES: 6
